title: Notification No.07/2002-CE (N.T)
text: This notification amends Notification No. 20/2001-C.E. (NT), dated 30-4-2001. 1st March, 2002 Notification No. 7/2002-Central Excise (N.T.) In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (2) of section 3 of the Central Excise Act, 1944 (1 of 1944), the Central Government, being satisfied that it is necessary in the public interest so to do, hereby makes the following amendment in the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Finance (Department of Revenue), No. 20/2001-Central Excise (N.T.), dated the 30th April, 2001, namely,- In the said notification, for the words and figures "articles of apparel, not knitted or crocheted, all sorts, falling under sub- heading No. 6201.00", the words and figures "articles of apparel, whether or not knitted or crocheted, all sorts, falling under sub-heading No. 6101.00 or 6201.00" shall be substituted. T.R. Rustagi Joint Secretary to the Government of India F. No. 334/1/2001-TRU Footnote: The principal notification No. 20/2001-Central Excise (N.T.), dated the 30th April, 2001, was published in the Gazette of India vide number G.S.R. 318 (E), dated the 30th April, 200. -- 1 of 1 --
